== Notes for [[Item:Q107877|Q107877]] ==

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zubaidah_bint_Ja%60far
Source 2
https://ar.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D8%AC%D8%B9%D9%81%D8%B1_%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%A3%D9%83%D8%A8%D8%B1

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:4620639915470079633

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
